task_description: GAIME MVP 1: Create a Kotlin Multiplatform project with Compose Multiplatform targeting Android + Desktop. Implement core GameStateMachine, LetterSwarm particle scene, SpriteIdle placeholder scene, manual AI state buttons, Android Activity shell, and Desktop window shell. No WebView, no Overlay, no browser integration.

verification.summary: All three features implemented. ./gradlew build succeeds (107 tasks), ./gradlew allTests passes (12 tests across desktop/android: 8 GameStateMachine + 4 ParticleEngine), ./gradlew :composeApp:desktopJar builds successfully. Tests cover state machine transitions and particle physics behaviors with meaningful assertions.
